Our Services

Built Around Waterproofing Performance, Finish Quality, and Long-Term Reliability

Roof Waterproofing

Torch-on and liquid systems engineered for long-term weather resistance.

Balcony Waterproofing

Membrane detailing for high-risk balcony perimeters, outlets, and upstands.

Basement Waterproofing

Sub-structure protection against hydrostatic pressure and persistent seepage.

Flat Roof Systems

Complete flat roof waterproofing upgrades with premium membrane finishes.

Wet Room Waterproofing

Professional tanking and floor-to-wall transitions for leak-proof interiors.

Liquid Waterproofing

Seamless liquid membrane coatings for complex details and hard-to-reach zones.

Leak Prevention

Survey-led defect prevention designed to stop expensive future damage.

Commercial Waterproofing

Large-scale waterproofing for apartment blocks, retail units, and facilities.

Cinematic Waterproofing Case Work Using Real Prime Seal Site Media

Dublin Docklands

Commercial Roof Recovery

Multi-stage waterproofing remediation with reflective top coat and reinforced detailing around penetrations.

Real site execution footage

South Dublin

Balcony Edge & Drain Detailing

Balcony rewaterproofing package with priming, liquid membrane, and sealed drainage points.

Real site execution footage

Dublin 6

Wet Area Tanking Upgrade

Full wet-room rebuild support with substrate correction, corner reinforcement, and premium finish quality.

About Prime Seal

Established Craftsmanship With Specialist Focus on Waterproofing Longevity

Prime Seal combines technical waterproofing knowledge with premium site execution. Every detail from substrate prep to final finish is delivered to protect property value and prevent recurring failures.

DublinSouth DublinNorth DublinCommercial SitesResidential Projects

Detail-Led Execution

Every waterproofing package is shaped around substrate condition, drainage detail, and exposure risk rather than one-size-fits-all fixes.

Real Project Evidence

The website is built around real Prime Seal site photography and live project video, showing actual finishes, detailing, and working conditions.

Residential & Commercial

From balconies and wet rooms to roof decks and commercial areas, the service offering is structured for both private and large-scale properties.

Long-Term Protection Focus

The emphasis is on robust waterproofing systems, clean detailing, and work that protects the property beyond the short term.

Why Clients Reach Out

Built Around the Things Property Owners Actually Care About

“

Clear Site Assessments

Straightforward guidance on the waterproofing issue, the likely failure points, and the best-fit system for the property.

“

Premium Finish Quality

A strong visual finish matters just as much as system performance, especially across visible roof and balcony surfaces.

“

Practical Communication

Fast response times, direct contact routes, and simple next steps help convert enquiries into booked site visits.
